features: Effortless Curls Just a Sleep Away: Achieve beautiful no heat curls overnight with our innovative hair styling solution. Our beautifully crafted satin heatless curling set is both heat & chemical free to prevent any sort of hair damage

For All Hair Types & Lengths: Easily transform straight hair into your dream curls with our heatless curls overnight. We offer the most sleek heatless curls for short hair, medium, or long hair. The satin material helps reduce breakage & frizz

Attractive 5-Piece Gift for Teenagers & Women: Our heatless curlers set includes 2x scrunchies, 1x satin rod, 1x hair clip and 1x wide tooth comb. This is a unique and thoughtful gift that girls would love for their birthdays or any occasions

Easy To Use: Wrap your hair secure with the included scrunchies and leave the hair curlers with no heat overnight or for a minimum of 3 hours. Brush out the curls with our wide teeth comb and use a hairspray for a more firm hold

Healthy, Shiny Results: Our overnight curls headband protect your hair from heat damage, reducing split-ends while enhancing your hair’s natural shine. Achieve smooth, salon-quality curls at home without compromising your hair's health

Yes, it works on all hair types—straight, wavy, curly, and coily. Does it cause frizz or damage? No, it doesn’t cause frizz or damage. It's designed to be gentle and heat-free, protecting your hair. Can it be used for shorter hair styles? Yes, it works well on shorter hair, as long as the hair can wrap around the curler. Is it comfortable to sleep in? Yes, it's soft and lightweight, making it comfortable to sleep in overnight.
